hooks.command: $raw = $Input | Out-String; $obj = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $path = $obj.tool_input.file_path.Replace('\', '/'); if ($path -match 'supabase/migrations/.+[.]sql') { Write-Output '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Migration detectada! Regenere os tipos do Supabase:\nnpx supabase gen types typescript --project-id SEU_PROJECT_ID > src/types/supabase.ts"}' }
